title: GeneralSimmElections
description: A class to specify the ISDA SIMM as the Method for all Covered Transactions with respect to all Regimes.

simmVersion.description: The qualification of the ISDA SIMM version that is specified for all Covered Transactions.

simmCalculationCurrency.description: The SIMM Calculation Currency, as specified for each of the parties to the CSA Initial Margin.
